what_it_does: A generated (do-not-edit) IIFE bundle that is the entire 'dc-runtime' — the client-side Design Component runtime. It loads React/ReactDOM UMD from unpkg, parses an <x-dc> template + a <script data-dc-script> logic class out of the host HTML page, compiles the template (a {{expr}}/sc-for/sc-if/x-import/dc-import/helmet mini-language) into React element builders, evaluates the author's `class Component extends DCLogic` via `new Function`, and mounts it into #dc-root. Supports streaming updates, sibling-component fetch, external JS/JSX module imports (Babel for JSX), an editor bridge (annotated template + postMessage), error boundaries, placeholders, and print CSS. This is the runtime that PitchDeck.dc.html in this same folder includes.
observations: Header comment: 'GENERATED from dc-runtime/src/*.ts — do not edit. Rebuild with `cd dc-runtime && bun run build`.'

Byte-identical in content to the dc-runtime bundle shipped at templates/capital-raise/support.js — same parser, expression engine, registry, component factory, external loader, helmet, pseudo-sheet, runtime, and index sections.
Custom expression resolver (paths, [index], equality/inequality, !, literals) — no full JS eval in templates.
Template language: {{}}, <sc-for list as hint-placeholder-count>, <sc-if value hint-placeholder-val>, <x-import from/component/component-from-global-scope>, <dc-import name>, <helmet>.
Pins React 18.3.1 + ReactDOM via unpkg URLs with SRI; Babel standalone 7.26.4 for JSX x-imports.
Two `new Function(...)` uses (logic eval, external module eval), each nosemgrep-tagged.
StreamableComponent is a React error boundary with circular-import detection via AncestorContext.

Streaming flags (htmlStreaming/jsStreaming) drive placeholder/shimmer vs render-nothing; hint-size/hint-placeholder-count reserve skeleton layout (used by PitchDeck's x-import hint-size 1280px,720px).
Editor bridge window API: __dcUpdate/__dcSetProps/__dcAnnotatedTemplate/__dcTemplateSource/__dcBoot/__dcRegistry; postMessage __dc_booted to parent.
standouts: A complete from-scratch reactive template runtime (parser + safe-ish expression engine + React bridge + registry + error boundary + streaming) in one generated file.
Built-in streaming placeholders with hint-driven layout reservation — directly serves PitchDeck's slide x-imports while the Slide component loads.
data-dc-tpl node stamping for a render→source editor mapping bridge.
conventions: esbuild IIFE with src/*.ts section comments preserved.
getReact/getReactDOM throw when React absent; template/logic errors are caught and surfaced as on-screen overlays.
Public-CDN dependency (unpkg) for React/ReactDOM/Babel, fetched with SRI.
concerns: Located at templates/pitch-deck/support.js yet byte-identical to the capital-raise copy — implies a per-template duplicate of the single dc-runtime build output.
Hard runtime dependency on unpkg.com CDN; cannot boot if the CDN is blocked/offline.
notes: Same dc-runtime bundle as the capital-raise support.js; this is the runtime the sibling PitchDeck.dc.html boots from — edit dc-runtime/src and rebuild, never this file.
questions: Is this a per-template copy or a build output replicated into each template folder (the file alone can't say)?
What component/server streams chunks into __dcUpdate for the pitch deck's slides?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the header declares it the generated dc-runtime and the body is exactly that runtime.
apparent_themes: fail-visible error boundaries over silent degradation
intention_signals: Built so a server (likely AI) can stream a template + logic class into a live page and have it render incrementally as React, with placeholders during streaming and an editor able to map rendered nodes back to source — here the runtime under the pitch-deck template.
novelty: A bespoke HTML-template-to-React compiler with a custom expression language, streaming skeletons, circular-import detection, and an editor postMessage bridge, all in one generated bundle.
contribution: Contributes the complete Design Component execution runtime that the pitch-deck (and capital-raise) templates boot from — template compilation, the mini-language, registry+subscription reactivity, streaming placeholders, error boundary, and the editor bridge.
summary_for_embedding: Generated dc-runtime IIFE bundle (identical to the capital-raise copy) under the pitch-deck template: a client-side Design Component runtime loading React from unpkg, compiling <x-dc> templates and a DCLogic class into streaming-aware React with error boundaries and an editor bridge.
intention_for_embedding: To render the pitch-deck template's AI-streamed HTML + logic class as live, incrementally-rendered, editable React components on a standalone .dc.html page.
